text: Hey — I've been thinking about you, and I wanted to send a small nudge: please rest. You've been carrying a lot lately, and you don't have to earn the right to slow down. The work will still be there tomorrow, but you only get one you, and you matter more than any of it. So take the afternoon, or the evening, or the whole weekend if you can. Put your feet up, let the dishes wait, sleep in without guilt. Let someone take care of you for a change. You've given so much to everyone around you, and the kindest thing you could do right now is turn a little of that care back toward yourself. No need to reply to this — just go rest. I'll be here whenever you surface, and I'm not going anywhere.
